actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / FH-LSZ numba seed-independence audit
combiner_policy: The chunk combiner must reject historical chunks without the seed marker and any chunks sharing duplicate gauge-evolution signatures across distinct metadata seeds.
exact_next_action: Let any old-code chunk finish only as a seed-invalid diagnostic; rerun replacement L12 chunks under numba_gauge_seed_v1 before counting them for combination.
proposal_allowed_reason: This audit demotes historical chunk evidence; it supplies no scalar pole residue, L16/L24 scaling, or physical y_t closure.
strict_non_claims: does not treat chunk001/chunk002 as independent production evidence
does not use observed top mass or observed y_t
does not use H_unit, Ward authority, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0 as proof selectors
verdict: The completed chunk001/chunk002 outputs cannot be counted as independent production evidence.  Their metadata seeds differ, but their gauge-evolution signature is identical and neither historical output carries the numba_gauge_seed_v1 seed-control marker.  The harness is now patched to seed numba gauge evolution inside run_volume_numba and to record per-volume seed-control metadata.  Current historical chunks must be rerun under the patched harness or excluded from L12 combination.
